name: Dandelion Green Fettuccini
recipeInstructions:
Some people find dandelion greens too strong simply added to a salad, but here is a basic pasta recipe that uses them to the best effect. It also works for other greens; beet greens, arugula, orach, or chicory. It is so tasty that it needs only butter and grated Asiago cheese. When making the pasta, adjust the amount of flour to the moisture of the greens.
1. In a blender, combine dandelion greens and eggs. Blend until smooth.
2. Transfer mixture to a bowl, add salt. Gradually add flour while beating with a spoon. Continue adding until dough is stiff.
3. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth (approximately 5 minutes).
4. Roll out with a rolling pin to a thickness of 1/8"-1/4 inch or thinner.
5. Allow the pasta to stand for 1 hour, then cut into strips.
6. Drop into boiling water and cook for 1-2 minutes.
